title: The AST simplification phase assertion failed.
body:
### Version

 Yosys 0.55+23 

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

try to read_verilog  on the following module:


```
module top (
  input  [2:0] in,
  output [2:0] out
);
  buf buf_array [2:0] (out, in);
endmodule

```





### Expected Behavior

Successfully finished Verilog frontend.


### Actual Behavior

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: 1.v
Parsing Verilog input from `1.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::out_of_range'
  what():  vector::_M_range_check: __n (which is 0) >= this->size() (which is 0)
Aborted (core dumped)
